name: fullstack-pilot
description: Codebase governance for full-stack Microsoft shops (Angular, .NET, SQL Server, Azure)

plugins.name: pilot-core
plugins.description: Shared governance: commit conventions, PR templates, and code-health checks for all full-stack Microsoft projects

plugins.name: pilot-angular
plugins.description: Angular / TypeScript governance: component patterns, signal migration, and standalone best practices

plugins.name: pilot-dotnet
plugins.description: C# / ASP.NET Core governance: minimal-API patterns, EF Core best practices, and NuGet security audits

plugins.name: pilot-sql
plugins.description: SQL Server / EF Core governance: migration safety checks, query review, and index analysis

plugins.name: pilot-azure
plugins.description: Azure / Bicep / ACA governance: resource-naming rules, cost guardrails, and deployment safety hooks
